recipes.title: Crema Salad
recipes.description: This easy Mexican street corn salad is the ultimate summer side dish! Lightly creamy, spicy & bright, it's a recipe you'll make again and again.
steps: Preheat a grill to medium-high heat. Brush the corn with olive oil and grill for 2 minutes per side, or until char marks form. Remove from grill and set aside.

In a large bowl, combine the mayo, garlic, and lime zest and juice. Slice the kernels off the corn and add to the bowl along with the scallions. Stir to coat, then add the cheese, cilantro, smoked paprika, jalapeño, and salt. Season to taste and serve immediately or chill until ready to serve.

recipes.title: Falafel
recipes.description: Ready to learn how to make authentic falafel from scratch? My family’s secret recipe for the Best Authentic Falafel, made with chickpeas, fresh herb, and spices is all you need! Be sure to check out the complete step-by-step tutorial, important tips for baking or frying falafel. And watch the video just above. What’s your favorite way to enjoy falafel? I love them in warm pita sandwiches with tahini sauce or hummus, along with my lazy Mediterranean tomato and cucumber salad. But you can enjoy it

ingredients.name: dried chickpeas (Do NOT use canned or cooked chickpeas)

steps: (One day in advance) Place the dried chickpeas and baking soda in a large bowl filled with water to cover the chickpeas by at least 2 inches. Soak overnight for 18 hours (longer  if the chickpeas are still too hard). When ready, drain the chickpeas completely and pat them dry.

Add the chickpeas, herbs, onions, garlic and spices to the large bowl of a food processor fitted with a blade. Run the food processor 40 seconds at a time until all is well combined forming a the falafel mixture.
Transfer the falafel mixture to a container and cover tightly. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour or (up to one whole night) until ready to cook.
Just before frying, add the baking powder and sesame seeds to the falafel mixture and stir with a spoon.
Scoop tablespoonfuls of the falafel mixture and form into patties (1/2 inch in thickness each). It helps to have wet hands as you form the patties.

Fill a medium saucepan 3 inches up with oil. Heat the oil on medium-high until it bubbles softly. Carefully drop the falafel patties in the oil, let them fry for about 3 to 5 minutes or so until crispy and medium brown on the outside. Avoid crowding the falafel in the saucepan, fry them in batches if necessary.
Place the fried falafel patties in a colander or plate lined with paper towels to drain.
Serve falafel hot next to other small plates; or assemble the falafel patties in pita bread with tahini or hummus, arugula, tomato and cucumbers. Enjoy!

recipes.title: Briam (Greek Roasted Vegetables)
recipes.description: Briam is simple and absolutely delicious roasted vegetables, prepared Greek style. Potatoes, Zucchini, and Red onions tossed in a mixture of EVOO, garlic, parsley and spices, then roasted in saucy diced tomatoes. This is a healthy, vegan, text-book Mediterranean diet dish that can stand as a main course or served next to other entrees. See tips and suggestions in the notes.

ingredients.name: / 570 g gold potatoes (about 3 medium-size potatoes), peeled and thinly sliced into rounds (about 1/8-inch thick)
/ 570 g zucchini squash (2 to 3 zucchini), thinly sliced into rounds (about 1/4-inch thick)
Harvest Greek extra virgin olive oil
/ 794 g canned diced tomatoes with juice (no-salt added organic tomatoes are recommended)
red onion or 2 smaller red onions, thinly sliced into rounds (if large, you’ll want to cut the onion in half first, and then slice)

steps: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F. Place a rack in the middle.

Place sliced potatoes and zucchini in a large mixing bowl. Season with kosher salt, pepper, oregano, and rosemary. Add fresh parsley, garlic, and a generous drizzle extra virgin olive oil. Toss to make sure the vegetables are well coated with the EVOO and spices.
Grab a large round pan on skillet (I used an 11-inch oven safe pan. See notes for more options.) Pour 1/2 of the canned diced tomatoes in and spread to cover the bottom of the pan.
Arrange the seasoned potatoes, zucchini, and sliced onions in the pan in rows (simply going around the shape of the pan and alternating.)
If you have any of the extra virgin olive oil and garlic mixture left in the mixing bowl, pour that all over the veggies, then top with the remaining diced tomatoes from your can.

Cover the pan with foil (tent foil a bit so it is not touching the veggies). Bake in 400 degrees F heated-oven for 45 minutes. Take pan out briefly to carefully remove foil, then place back in oven,  uncovered, and roast for another 30-40 minutes or until the veggies are soft and charred and most of the liquid has evaporated. (ovens do vary, so pay attention and check as needed.)
Remove from oven. Serve warm or at room temperature with an added generous drizzle of extra virgin olive oil. (see suggestions for to serve along.)

recipes.title: Bean Chili
recipes.description: Adam Ragusea’s bean-and-tomato chili — video walkthrough with timestamped steps.

ingredients.name: beans, drained and rinsed (or soaked dried beans)
dark chocolate chips or Mexican chocolate (optional)

steps: Dice onions and bell peppers
Cook vegetables in oil over high heat until softened
Add canned tomatoes
Add drained canned beans
Bring to a simmer
Season with cumin, smoked paprika, oregano, and garlic powder
Optional: melt in a little dark chocolate

recipes.title: Garlic Butter Chicken with Parmesan Cauliflower Rice
recipes.description: Quick, Healthy dinner with Garlic Butter chicken and cauliflower rice — The ultimate gluten free/low carb dinner.

ingredients.name: boneless and skinless chicken breasts, halved horizontally to make 4
of one lemon (+ zest, if you like)

steps: The  Garlic  Butter Chicken

In a shallow plate, combine parmesan cheese, grated garlic, paprika, and Italian seasoning. Season the chicken breasts with salt and pepper; dredge in the parmesan mixture; shake off excess and set aside.

In a large non-stick skillet melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium-high heat. Cook chicken cutlets until golden on each side and cooked through – about 3-4 minutes for each side, depending on the thickness of your chicken cutlets. Transfer to a plate.
The Parmesan Cauliflower Rice
In the same pan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter. Fry the garlic and onion for 1 minute until fragrant — be careful not to burn.
Add the riced cauliflower to the skillet and stir to mix everything together well and coat in melted butter. Cook, stirring regularly for 1 minute.

Stir in the 2 tablespoons vegetable stock, about half the parsley, and lemon zest (if using). Cook the cauliflower rice for one minute to reduce juices then add the lemon juice and a few sprinkles of leftover parmesan cheese, if you like.

Adjust seasoning as needed. Stir in the remaining parsley. Return chicken breasts over cauliflower rice and reheat quickly. Serve your parmesan chicken with fresh cracked black pepper, red chili pepper flakes, and more parmesan. Enjoy!
Note: Make sure to use a non-stick pan, otherwise the parmesan might stick.

recipes.title: Asian Chicken Lettuce Wraps
recipes.description: Chicken lettuce wraps with Asian flavors.
steps: See source link or add steps when you cook this.

recipes.title: Bruschetta Grilled Chicken
recipes.description: If you're looking for an easy grilled chicken recipe, this bruschetta chicken should be next on your summer weeknight dinner rotation.

ingredients.name: skinless antibiotic free chicken breasts, pounded to even thickness

steps: In a small bowl, combine oil, half the lemon juice, 1 teaspoon salt, 1/4 teaspoon pepper, and Italian seasoning (or oregano) and whisk to combine. Transfer to a large re-sealable bag along with chicken; seal and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Heat grill over medium-high then add chicken, discarding excess marinade. Grill until charred and cooked to an internal temperature of 155°-160°, about 5 to 7 minutes per side.

Meanwhile, combine tomatoes, garlic, basil, and remaining lemon juice, and season with salt and pepper. While chicken is still on grill, top each breast with 1 slice mozzarella and cover until cheese is melted, 2 to 3 minutes. Top chicken with tomato mixture.
Garnish with Parmesan and serve.

recipes.title: Salsa Chicken Lettuce Wraps
recipes.description: These chicken lettuce wraps are so delicious - Citrusy, sweet, spicy, and savory all in one, the salsa that goes with grilled chicken will steal the show. Perfect for a quick lunch, dinner, or meal prep!

ingredients.name: chicken thighs, skinless and boneless (650 g)
of Boston lettuce, rinsed and leaves trimmed

steps: To make the salsa chicken lettuce wraps: Combine lime juice, oil, garlic, cumin, salt, and chili in a large shallow plate or bowl; mix together. Add the chicken thighs and let marinate for 30 minutes.

Heat a large skillet on medium heat. Add a drizzle of olive oil and sear the chicken thighs on both sides until golden, charred, and cooked through (count about 8 minutes per side, depending on the thickness of your chicken thighs). Flip them a couple of times while cooking so they get a nice even color.
Transfer cooked chicken thighs to a warm plate or a cutting board, loosely tent with foil, and let rest before slicing into strips.

While chicken is resting, combine all ingredients for the salsa. Mix well and arrange on top of stacked Boston lettuce leaves. Place the grilled chicken on top. Enjoy the salsa chicken lettuce wraps immediately!

recipes.title: Baked Shrimp
recipes.description: These baked shrimps are gorgeous and super quick to prepare! Just pop the shrimps in the oven and dinner is ready.

ingredients.name: Sriracha sauce (or any hot sauce you like)
fresh lemon juice + slices of lemon for garnish

steps: To make the baked shrimp: Preheat your oven to 350ºF (180ºC). Arrange shrimp in a baking dish.
In a small bowl, combine broth, sriracha and lemon juice.
Pour the mixture over shrimp in the baking dish, season with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes. Top shrimp with minced garlic and speck with the diced butter.

recipes.title: Garlic Butter Sausages and Broccoli Skillet
recipes.description: One-pan sausages and broccoli in garlic butter.
steps: See source link or add steps when you cook this.

recipes.title: Cajun Shrimp and Sausage Foil Packs
recipes.description: These tasty baked shrimp and sausage foil packets make a healthy and delicious dinner in less than 30 minutes.

ingredients.name: asparagus, trimmed and cut in chunks

steps: To make these baked shrimp and sausage foil packs: Preheat your oven to 425ºF (220ºC). Cut 2 sheets of 14 by 12-inch (35 x 30 cm) heavy-duty aluminum foil then lay each piece separately on the countertop.
Divide shrimp and sausage onto the aluminum foil near the center then place zucchini, red bell pepper, and asparagus on the side. Sprinkle generously with the Cajun seasoning mix.
Add minced garlic over shrimp, sausage, and veggies. Divide butter pieces evenly among the shrimp foil packets, layering them over the shrimp and vegetables.
Add a tablespoon vegetable stock in each foil packet and wrap packets in and crimp edges together then wrap ends up. Don’t wrap too tight – keep a little extra space inside for heat to circulate.
Transfer to a baking sheet and bake shrimp and sausage foil packets in the oven, sealed side upward until shrimps and veggies have cooked through, about 15 minutes.
Carefully unwrap the baked sausage shrimp foil packets with vegetables then garnish with fresh parsley and a slice of lemon. Enjoy!

recipes.title: Creamy Garlic Parmesan Chicken with Mushrooms
recipes.description: Creamy skillet chicken with mushrooms and parmesan.
steps: See source link or add steps when you cook this.

recipes.title: Slow Cooker Lemon-Garlic Chicken Breast
recipes.description: With a handful of ingredients you are treated to tender chicken gilded with a velvety lemon sauce infused with a richness reminiscent of roasted garlic.

ingredients.name: kosher salt, plus more for the chicken
freshly ground black pepper, plus more for the chicken

steps: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat until shimmering. Liberally season the chicken breasts on both sides with salt and pepper. Place the chicken in the pan and sear until browned on the bottom, about 5 minutes.

Transfer the chicken seared-side up to a 6-quart or larger slow cooker in a single layer. Add the broth, lemon juice, and garlic. Cover and cook on the LOW setting until the chicken is cooked through, tender, and registers 165°F on an instant-read thermometer, 3 to 4 hours. Meanwhile, place the butter and flour in a small bowl and use your fingers to rub the flour into the butter; set aside.

Transfer the chicken to plates or a serving platter. Pour the liquid and garlic from the slow cooker into a small saucepan and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Add the butter mixture and whisk constantly until completely incorporated into the sauce. Cook, stirring frequently, until the sauce is thickened, 3 to 4 minutes. Pour over the chicken, sprinkle with parsley if desired, and serve.
Recipe Notes

recipes.title: Low Carb Chicken Enchilada Casserole
recipes.description: Chicken enchilada casserole is a family favorite meal that is so easy to make. Chicken, enchilada sauce and cheese are baked until it’s all golden brown and delicious.

ingredients.name: enchilada sauce (store bought or from scratch)
finely crumbled queso fresco or feta cheese
oil spray (or you can use olive oil in a little bowl with a brush)
boneless chicken breasts (skinless, trimmed, and pounded if necessary)

steps: Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
Pat chicken dry and season with salt and pepper.

Combine the chicken and enchilada sauce in a medium saucepan & simmer for 10-15 minutes over medium-low heat. Then flip the chicken over, cover and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes until chicken reaches 160-165 degrees with an instant-read thermometer.
Remove chicken from pan and shred into bite-sized pieces. Combine shredded chicken, the enchilada sauce, queso fresco, chiles and cilantro in a bowl. Add salt and pepper if desired.
Spray a square casserole dish with olive oil (or use a brush) and coat the entire bottom and sides.

Evenly spread 1 cup of shredded cheddar cheese on the bottom of the dish. Add the chicken mixture, then add the other cup of cheddar cheese on top. Cover with foil and bake for about 10 minutes. Remove foil and bake an additional 3 to 5 minutes to melt the cheese.
Serve with optional lime wedges and optional sour cream.

recipes.title: Keto Chicken Gyros
recipes.description: Delicious chicken cooked on a DIY skewer. Greek style!

ingredients.name: Fresh or Dried Thyme (You can also use oregano)

steps: Mix the yogurt with the olive oil, lemon zest, lemon juice, minced garlic, salt, pepper and spices in a big bowl. Set the marinade aside and move on to the chicken
Place some cling film over the chicken thigh and beat it with the flat end of the meat mallet to even it out. This will help it cook more evenly. Do this to all the thighs.
Then marinate the thighs in the marinade for about 24 hours. You can marinate it for a shorter duration as well. It's completely up to you.

Then cut a thick piece of onion and push a skewer through it to create a vertical spit. Then pierce and layer the chicken one above the other in opposite directions (watch the video) and then bake in a pre-heated oven at 200C for 1.5-2 hours.
Once done just slice that chicken and eat with some tzatziki or in a Keto naan or even in a salad bowl.

recipes.title: Keto Fried Tilapia with Lemon Garlic Butter
recipes.description: Gluten-free fried tilapia with lemon garlic butter.
steps: Melt 1 tablespoon butter; cook garlic 30 seconds. Off heat, add lemon juice, zest, capers; season. Set sauce aside.
Season tilapia with salt and pepper. Whisk eggs in a shallow dish.
Combine Parmesan and pork rinds on a plate. Dip fish in egg, then dredge in cheese mixture.
Heat 1/2 inch oil in a skillet over medium-high. Fry fish in batches until golden brown.
Serve with lemon caper sauce.
recipes.notes: Original bookmark: ketofy.me (redirects). Data from ketopots.com via browser/WebFetch.

recipes.title: Greek Chicken (Slow Cooker)
recipes.description: This Greek Chicken is super easy to throw together for a busy weeknight. Simply add the ingredients and let your slow cooker do the rest - you'll be coming home to a delicious ready meal!

ingredients.name: Preserved Lemons ((click link for recipe) **Highly recommended for the best flavor and they're super easy to make!)

steps: In a small bowl, whisk together the sauce ingredients and set aside until ready to use.
Place the chicken in the slow cooker and pour the sauce over the chicken. Cook on LOW for 6-8 hours or on HIGH for 4-5 hours. During the last hour of cooking add the olives and capers.
Served with crusty bread or rice and/or a simple Greek salad consisting of chopped tomatoes, cucumbers, red onions, crumbled Feta cheese and Italian dressing.

recipes.title: Vegetarian Bibimbap with Tofu
recipes.description: Bibimbap is a Korean rice bowl topped with vegetable sides and meat and served with a gochujang sauce. Follow my easy step-by-step recipe to make the best bibimbap!

ingredients.name: thinly sliced tender beef (rib eye, sirloin, etc. or ground beef)
minced garlic ((This recipes needs 2.5 teaspoons minced garlic in total. Mince it all at once for efficiency.))
mung bean sprouts (sukju, 숙주) (or soybean sprouts (kongnamul, 콩나물) - see more vegetable options below.)

recipes.description: Thai chicken coconut soup with galangal and lime.
steps: See source link or add steps when you cook this.

steps: See source link or add steps when you cook this.

recipes.title: Artichoke and Parmesan Dip
recipes.description: Artichoke and Parmesan Dip — Garrabrant family recipe (Appetizers).
steps: Preheat oven to 350.
Mix all ingredients in mixing bowl.
Move to baking dish.
Bake for 20 minutes or until bubbly.
Serve with Stacy's pita chips (or crackers, bread, etc)

recipes.title: Bacon Wrapped Water Chestnuts
recipes.description: Bacon Wrapped Water Chestnuts — Garrabrant family recipe (Appetizers).
steps: Recipe body empty on byonandlara.com — open source link to view or add steps manually.

recipes.title: Cheese Bread
recipes.description: Cheese Bread — Garrabrant family recipe (Appetizers).
steps: Preheat over to 375
Mix cheddar/jack, Parmesan, green onions, mayonnaise, garlic powder and pepper.
Spread 1/2 cup mixture on each slice of bread
Cook on cookie sheet until bubbly and toasted (about 15 minutes)

recipes.title: Eggrolls
recipes.description: Eggrolls — Garrabrant family recipe (Appetizers).
steps: Heat sesame oil in frying pan and add chicken
Stir fry until chicken is no longer pink
Add celery and carrots and stir fry a few minutes more.
Slowly add cabbage (cabbage will shrink)
Season with garlic, ginger and pepper.
Stir in oyster sauce.
Let mixture cool slightly
Wrap heaping Tbs of mixture in each wrapper according to directions.
Deep fry in peanut oil (or canola/vegetable oil).

recipes.title: Lumpia
recipes.description: Lumpia — Garrabrant family recipe (Appetizers).
steps: Mix breakfast sausage, water chestnuts, green onions, garlic powder and black pepper.
Spread 1-2 Tsp of meat mixture in a line on lumpia wrapper. Roll according to directions on package. Repeat until all wrappers rolled.
Cut lumpia rolls in half.
Deep fry (15-20 halves at a time) until golden brown.
Serve with Sweet Chili Sauce

recipes.title: Welsh Rarebit
recipes.description: Welsh Rarebit — Garrabrant family recipe (Appetizers).
steps: Melt butter in saucepan over low heat.
Blend in flour, salt, pepper, Worcestershire sauce and hot pepper sauce.
Continue cooking and stirring until the mixture is smooth and bubbly, about 5 min.
Remove from heat.
Gradually stir in milk.
Return to heat and stir continuously until the mixture comes to a boil.
Slowly pour in the beer.
Cook 1 minute more while stirring.
Melt the cheddar cheese into the mixture in small portions until incorporated.
Remove from heat (or transfer to fondue pot on low heat)

recipes.title: Chicken Tortilla Soup
recipes.description: Chicken Tortilla Soup — Garrabrant family recipe (Soups).

ingredients.name: 1-2 doz. corn tortillas (cut into 1/4 inch strips)

steps: In a large pot add a little bit of oil and saute' onions and garlic over medium heat.
Add chicken, bell pepper, carrot slices and chili powder.
Saute' a few minutes more.  Add chicken broth, tomatoes, drained corn and oregano.
Bring to a simmer and cook another 10-15 minutes or more.
Cook tortilla strips in oil in a pan or deep fryer until crispy (you can use store bought tortilla chips, but it is tastier with the home cooked ones).
Line individual serving bowls with tortilla strips, top with jack cheese and pour broth mixture over the top.
Serve with sourdough or french bread.

recipes.title: Corn Chowder
recipes.description: Corn Chowder — Garrabrant family recipe (Soups).

ingredients.name: thyme (3/4 tsp fresh minced or 1/4 tsp dried)

steps: Boil potatoes and carrots until soft and drain.
Slice bacon and cook in frying pan. Add hot links to bacon and sear. Remove both and drain on paper towel.
In a large saucepan, saute the celery, bell pepper, onion and jalapeno in butter until vegetables are tender.
Stir in flour until blended; gradually add milk.
Bring to a boil; cook and stir for 2 minutes or until thickened.
Stir in the remaining ingredients.
Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 10 minutes or until heated through.

recipes.title: Almond Chicken Salad Sandwiches
recipes.description: Almond Chicken Salad Sandwiches — Garrabrant family recipe (Salads).

ingredients.name: snipped dried apricots or golden raisins

steps: In large bowl, stir together chicken, celery, apricots and almonds.
Add remaining ingredients. Mix well. Refrigerate.
Serve on croissant rolls.

recipes.title: Broccoli Salad
recipes.description: Broccoli Salad — Garrabrant family recipe (Salads).

ingredients.name: fresh broccoli, cut small, bite sized

steps: Combine broccoli, onion and raisins.
In a small bowl, whisk together vinegar, sugar and mayo.
Pour over broccoli mixture and toss
until well mixed.
Refrigerate at least two hours.
Before serving, toss salad with crumbled bacon and sunflower seeds.

recipes.title: Buffalo Chicken Salad
recipes.description: Buffalo Chicken Salad — Garrabrant family recipe (Salads).

ingredients.name: vegetable oil (1 turn of the pan)

steps: Combine lettuce, carrots and celery in salad bowl.
Toss with dressing and blue cheese crumbles.
Preheat skillet over medium-high heat.
Add oil and butter to hot pan with chicken.
Season with salt and pepper and sear 2-3 minutes, then add hot sauce.
Reduce heat and cook 5 minutes more.
Top salad with buffalo chicken and serve.

recipes.title: Chinese Chicken Salad
recipes.description: Chinese Chicken Salad — Garrabrant family recipe (Salads).

ingredients.name: 1/2 pkg. wonton skins (sold in the produce dept. in most grocery stores)

steps: Mix all ingredients well before pouring onto salad mixture.
Slice wonton skins and deep fry until golden brown. (Chow Mien noodles can be substituted for cooked wonton skins if desired.)
Mix all salad ingredients and wonton topping and toss salad with dressing.

recipes.title: Chicken & Broccoli Stir-fry
recipes.description: Chicken & Broccoli Stir-fry — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).
steps: Place chicken, cornstarch, soy sauce and stir until chicken is thoroughly coated.
Let stand for 15 minutes.
Heat oil in wok over high heat
Add chicken and stir fry until browned.
Remove chicken from wok.
Add broccoli, onions and carrots and stir fry 2 minutes.
Add drained water chestnuts.
Return chicken to pan.
Stir in chicken broth.
Cover and cook gently for 5 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
Serve with rice.

recipes.title: Chicken Fajitas
recipes.description: Chicken Fajitas — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).

ingredients.name: Juice of 8 limes (small bottle of Real Lime juice)

steps: Mix marinade ingredients
Trim and butterfly or pound thin chicken breasts.
Marinade at least 3 hours.
Grill 3-5 on each side or until done.

recipes.title: Chicken Pot Pie
recipes.description: Chicken Pot Pie — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).
steps: Recipe body empty on byonandlara.com — open source link to view or add steps manually.

recipes.title: Chicken Satay
recipes.description: Chicken Satay — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).

ingredients.name: 6 skinless, boneless chicken breast halves - sliced

steps: In a mixing bowl, combine peanut butter, soy sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, curry powder, garlic and hot pepper sauce.
Place the chicken breasts in the marinade and refrigerate. Let the chicken marinate at least 2 hours, overnight is best.
Preheat a grill to high heat.
Weave the chicken onto skewers, then grill until cooked.
In a saucepan over medium heat, combine coconut milk, peanut butter, onion, soy sauce, brown sugar, and pepper flakes.
Bring to a boil, stirring frequently.
Remove from heat, and keep warm.

recipes.title: Chicken Tikka Masala
recipes.description: Chicken Tikka Masala — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).

ingredients.name: boneless chicken breast (cut into medium sized pieces)

steps: Mix all marinade ingredients and let chicken marinade one hour.
Cook chicken in baking pan at 350 until done.
Heat oil in pan.
Fry onions till they turn golden brown.
Add butter.
Add ginger and garlic paste and let them fry until the oil separates.
Add masala powders and then add tomato paste.
Let gravy come to a boil.
Add cooked chicken with juices and serve.

recipes.title: Chili-Lime Chicken Kabobs
recipes.description: Chili-Lime Chicken Kabobs — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).

ingredients.name: salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
chicken breasts (sliced or cut into 1 1/2 inch pieces)

steps: In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, vinegar, and lime juice.
Season with chili powder, paprika, onion powder, garlic powder, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Place the chicken in a shallow baking dish with the sauce, and stir to coat.
Cover, and marinate in the refrigerator at least 1 hour.
Preheat the grill for medium-high heat.
Thread chicken onto skewers, and discard marinade.
Lightly oil the grill grate.
Grill skewers for 10 to 15 minutes, or until the chicken juices run clear.

recipes.title: KFA Chili
recipes.description: KFA Chili — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).
steps: Brown ground beef and italian sausage in large pot.
Add smoked sausage, bell pepper, serranos, and garlic. Cook for 10 more minutes.
Add tomatoes, red wine, spices.
Simmer for about 2 hours.
Add drained beans. Simmer for 15 more minutes.

recipes.title: Korean BBQ Beef
recipes.description: Korean BBQ Beef — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).

ingredients.name: freshly ground black pepper to taste (optional)

steps: In a large resealable plastic bag, combine beef with garlic, pear, green onions, soy sauce, sugar, sesame oil, rice wine, sesame seeds, fresh ginger, and ground black pepper.
Seal, and refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours.
Grill, turning to brown evenly, for 3 to 6 minutes, or until done.

recipes.title: Mimi's Taquitos
recipes.description: Mimi's Taquitos — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).

ingredients.name: 1 lb. boneless chicken breast (cooked and shredded)

steps: Combine chicken, cheese, and green onions in a large mixing bowl.
Heat 1/4 inch of oil in a frying pan.
For each tortilla, dip in pan to soften.
Remove and let cool to touch.
Roll about 2 tablespoons of chicken mixture into tortilla.
Return to oil and fry until golden brown.
Transfer to plate lined with paper towels.
Salt generously.

recipes.title: Mini Meatloafs
recipes.description: Mini Meatloafs — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).
steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
In a large bowl, combine the egg, milk, cheese, oats and salt.
Add the ground beef and sausage, mix well and form into approx. 16 miniature meatloavess.
Place these in lightly greased baking dishes.
In a separae small bowl, combine ketchup, brown sugar and mustard.
Stir thoroughly and spread over each meatloaf.
Bake, uncovered, at 350 for 45 minutes

recipes.title: Noodles & White Sauce
recipes.description: Noodles & White Sauce — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).
steps: Mix meats, bread crumbs, onion, egg, celery seed, garlic, salt and pepper in large bowl.
Heat oil in frying pan.
Put chicken broth in separate dutch oven and heat on low.
Form meat mixture into 1 inch diameter balls and brown in oil without crowding.  Turn frequently to brown on all sides and transfer one at a time to chicken broth.
When all meatballs are in dutch over, cover and simmer for 45 minutes.
When done, remove meatballs from dutch oven and keep warm.
Add flour to pan, stir until smooth and cook 1 minute.  Add 1/2 cup water if gravy seems too thick.
Heat to boil and boil one minute.
Lower heat and add sour cream.  Heat thoroughly but do not boil.
Serve sauce over noodles and meatballs.

recipes.title: Rosemary and Balsamic Chicken with Ravioli
recipes.description: Rosemary and Balsamic Chicken with Ravioli — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).

ingredients.name: fresh rosemary (leaves stripped and chopped, about 2 Tbs)

steps: Coat chicken in balsamic vinegar, then olive oil.
Season chicken with rosemary, salt and pepper and let stand 10 minutes.
Heat medium skillet over high heat.
Add chicken breasts and garlic to pan.
Cook 12 minutes or until juices run clear, turning occasionally.
The balsamic with give chicken a deep brown sweet coating.
Cook ravioli according to package directions.  Drain.
Heat buffer on skillet, medium heat.
Let butter begin to brown.
Add cooked ravioli and turn in butter to heat through.
Add balsamic vinegar and cook another 2 minutes (makes a glaze-like syrup for the ravioli).
Add cheese, parsley, salt and pepper.
Serve chicken with ravioli.

recipes.title: Scaloppine di Pollo
recipes.description: Scaloppine di Pollo — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).
steps: Heat the lemon juice and white wine in a saucepan over medium heat.
Bring to a boil and reduce by one-third.
Add cream and simmer until mixture thickens (3 to 4 minutes).
Slowly add butter until completely incorporated.
Season with salt and pepper.
Remove from heat and keep warm.
Heat a small amount of oil and two tablespoons butter in a large skillet.
Dredge chicken in flour and saute in pan, turning once, until brown and cooked through.
Remove chicken from pan.
Cook bacon in pan.
Drain bacon grease.
Add artichokes and capers.
Saute 2 to 3 minutes.
Return chicken to pan.
Add sauce.
Toss sauce mixture in bowl with pasta.

recipes.title: Spaghetti Sauce
recipes.description: Spaghetti Sauce — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).
steps: In large, heavy stockpot, brown Italian sausage, breaking up as you stir.
Add onions and continue to cook, stirring occasionally until onions are softened.
Add garlic, tomatoes, tomato paste and tomato sauce.
Add 2 cups water, or less for shorter simmer time.
Add basil, parsley, brown sugar, salt, crushed red pepper, and black pepper.
Stir well and barely bring to a boil.
Stir in red wine.
Simmer on low, stirring frequently for at least an hour.

recipes.title: Taco Meat
recipes.description: Taco Meat — Garrabrant family recipe (Main Dishes).
steps: Saute onions in olive oil until translucent, 3 to 4 minutes.
Add garlic and cumin and continue to saute until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add beef, breaking the pieces up as they cook, until meat is browned, about 8 to 10 minutes.
Season with the chipotle pepper and salt.
Add beef broth and tomato paste and bring to a simmer.
Cook, stirring occasionally until most of the liquid has evaporated, about 20 minutes.

recipes.title: Corn Fritters
recipes.description: Corn Fritters — Garrabrant family recipe (Side Dishes).
steps: Combine corn, egg, and flour in a medium mixing bowl.
Heat 1/4 inch of oil in a frying pan.
Drop heaping tablespoon of corn mixture into oil and flatten.
Each corn fritter should be 2 - 3 inch in diameter and 1/2 inch thick.
Turn and cook until both sides are golden brown.
Remove from pan, dry on plate with paper towel.
Eat with butter and salt.

recipes.title: Creamed Corn
recipes.description: Creamed Corn — Garrabrant family recipe (Side Dishes).

ingredients.name: fresh, frozen or canned whole kernel corn

steps: Melt butter in heavy saucepan: add flour and salt, stirring to blend.
Slowly add whipping cream, stirring constantly until thickened.
Add sugar and corn, heat.

recipes.title: Roasted Vegetables
recipes.description: Roasted Vegetables — Garrabrant family recipe (Side Dishes).
steps: Preheat oven to 375.
Spread Vegetables on cookie sheet (with tin foil).
Coat vegetables with Olive Oil.  Season with Rosemary, Garlic, Steak Seasoning and Salt.  Mix.
Spread vegetables to single layer.
Cook 30 minutes or until soft and slightly caramelized.

recipes.title: Birds Nests
recipes.description: Birds Nests — Garrabrant family recipe (Sweets).
steps: Cover a baking sheet with waxed or parchment paper.
Heat butterscotch and peanut butter in microwave for one minute.
Stir and continue heating in 10 second increments until melted and smooth.
Stir in chow mein noodles.
With greased fingers shape mixture into birds nests and place on prepared pan.
Fill with M&Ms or jelly beans.
Refrigerate until firm.

recipes.title: Butter Pecan Turtle Bars
recipes.description: Butter Pecan Turtle Bars — Garrabrant family recipe (Sweets).
steps: Combine flour, 3/4 cup brown sugar and 1/2 cup butter: blend until crumbley.
Pat mixture firmly onto bottom of ungreased 9x13 inch pan.
Sprinkle pecan halves over the unbakes crust.  Set aside.
In small saucepan, combine 1/2 cup brown sugar and 2/3 cup butter.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture begins to boil.
Boil for one minute, stirring constantly.
Drizzle caramel over pecans and crust.
Bake at 350 degrees for 18-20 minutes or until caramel layer is bubbly and crust is light brown.
Remove from oven and immediately sprinkle with chocolate chips.
Spread chips evenly as they melt.
Cool completely before cutting.

recipes.title: Caramel Chex
recipes.description: Caramel Chex — Garrabrant family recipe (Sweets).
steps: Microwave first 3 ingredients on high for 1 minute.
Stir and microwave one more minute.
Add cereal and toss.

recipes.title: Caramel Graham Cracker Bark
recipes.description: Caramel Graham Cracker Bark — Garrabrant family recipe (Sweets).
steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Line rimmed cookie sheet with aluminum foil.
Place all graham crackers on cookie sheet.
In a small saucepan, melt butter and brown sugar.
Bring to a boil and stir constantly for 5 minutes.
Pour caramelized mixture evenly over graham crackers.
Sprinkle top with pecans.
Bake 10 minutes.
Cool completely and break into serving sized pieces.

recipes.title: Christmas Cookies
recipes.description: Christmas Cookies — Garrabrant family recipe (Sweets).
steps: In a large bowl, using electric mixer at medium speed, beat butter, sugar and vanilla until light and fluffy: Beat egg in well.
In a small bowl, combine flour, baking powder and salt: with mixer at low speed, beat flour mixture into butter mixture and blend well.
Flatten dough into disk shape:refrigerate, wrapped in plastic wrap, 30 minutes.
Preheat Oven to 350.
Roll and cut cookie with cookie cutters.
Place on un-greased cookie sheet.
Bake until lightly browned, 8 to 15 minutes.
Cool on wire racks and decorate.

recipes.title: Glorious Treats
recipes.description: Glorious Treats — Garrabrant family recipe (Sweets).
steps: Recipe body empty on byonandlara.com — open source link to view or add steps manually.

recipes.title: Pumpkin Gooey Butter Cakes
recipes.description: Pumpkin Gooey Butter Cakes — Garrabrant family recipe (Sweets).
steps: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
Combine the cake mix, egg, and butter and mix well with an electric mixer
Pat the mixture into the bottom of a lightly greased 13 by 9-inch baking pan.
In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese and pumpkin until smooth.
Add the eggs, vanilla, and butter, and beat together.
Add the powdered sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and mix well.
Spread pumpkin mixture over cake batter and bake for 40 to 50 minutes.
Make sure not to over bake as the center should be a little gooey.
Serve with fresh whipped cream.

recipes.title: Dutch Baby
recipes.description: Dutch Baby — Garrabrant family recipe (Breakfast & Brunch).
steps: Place cast iron skillets in oven and preheat to 450 degrees F. (Very important)
In a large bowl, beat the eggs until light and frothy; add milk, flour, vanilla extract, and cinnamon.
Beat for 5 minutes more. The batter will be thin, but very smooth and creamy.
Add butter to the hot skillets, tilting the pan to melt and coat.
Pour the prepared batter approx. 3/4 in deep all at once into hot skillets, and immediately return skillets to the oven.
Bake approximately 15 to 20 minutes or until puffed and golden brown.
Serve with butter, lemon wedges and powdered sugar

recipes.title: Florentine Garden Ring
recipes.description: Florentine Garden Ring — Garrabrant family recipe (Breakfast & Brunch).

ingredients.name: thick sliced deli ham coarsely chopped
(10 ounces) frozen chopped spinach, thawed and well drained
(in rolls, 8 ounces each) refrigerated reduced fat cresent rolls.

steps: Preheat oven to 375
Mix ham, onion, carrot, olives, 1 1/4 cup of the cheese, spinach, mayo and garlic.
Unroll cresent dough, separate into 16 triangles.
Arrange triangles, overlapping on a large round baking stone.  The wide ends are overlapping in the center and the pointed ends extend over the edges of the stone.
Press the wide ends towards center to make a 5-inch opening.
Spoon mixture evenly over dough in a continuous circle.
Arrange tomatoes over filling.
Bring points of triangles up over filling and tuck under dough at center to form a ring.
Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
Bake 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.

recipes.title: Nevada Eggs
recipes.description: Nevada Eggs — Garrabrant family recipe (Breakfast & Brunch).

ingredients.name: (sliced thin and then cut in half)
1 (16-oz.) pkg. Beef Hot Links (sliced and then quartered)

steps: In a large frying pan, cook bacon until done.
Remove bacon and drain most of bacon grease.
Add onions and potatoes to remaining bacon grease and saute' a few minutes over medium heat.
Add Hot Links and bell pepper. Cover and cook over low heat until potatoes are soft.
Scramble eggs in a separate frying pan.
Add eggs and bacon to first pan and mix well.
Top with cheddar cheese.
Serve with sourdough or french bread.
